content:
Hi :)

I am currently building a rust-based kernel module which is located under drivers/. Therefore, it seems like I am unable to use the already existing Makefile infrastructure to generate rustdoc files and use KUnit rustdoc tests. Am I missing something here or is the only way currently to modify the relevant Makefiles (which generate rustdocs for the kernel crate)?
Currently it is only available for kernel, but will be for other crates in the future.
